lint.details: 0 errors, 14 warnings (all pre-existing react-refresh and react-hooks warnings)

reviewerFallback: Task-tool subagent spawning failed with bun-eval parsing errors (all 8 attempts). Reviews conducted directly in the scrutiny-validator session as documented in AGENTS.md guidance.

nonBlockingIssues.description: executeAdapterStep is declared async but all internal step functions are synchronous. Harmless but slightly misleading — the async signature is intentional for future real-adapter integration.
Redaction only walks one level of nesting. If private reasoning fields were nested deeper than two levels, they would not be caught. Documented in code comments.
Delegation framework is in-memory only (no Supabase persistence). Chains reset on page reload. Expected for the proof surface.
Lido, AgentCash, and Celo all use similar deterministic dry-run snapshot builders based on address seeds. Appropriate for proof surfaces but the pattern is duplicated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the shared evidence-recording pattern (recordXxxEvidence + recordActivityEvent + sentinel agent_id for product-triggered flows) used across 6+ integration modules. A future refactor could extract a shared utility to reduce ~30 lines per module.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features m4-uniswap-quote-and-swap-surface, m4-bankr-and-celo-runtime-surfaces, m4-lido-openserv-and-agentcash-proof-surfaces all implement near-identical evidence recording helper functions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Evidence recording pattern duplication across integration modules could be extracted into a shared utility now
rejectedObservations.reason: While the pattern is duplicated, extracting it in a separate refactor during this milestone validation would risk regressions. Better addressed as a follow-up once all milestones are stable. Documented as a suggested guidance update instead.
